programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: When Lindsay gets the chance to sign up to the notoriously exclusive dating service Eternity, she clashes with Will, her first date. They mutually agree that the dating service is a complete bust and make a deal to get their money back.

programme.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries: Blessings in Disguise
programme.desc: After Cheryl's three-year engagement ends in a devastating breakup, her life is turned upside down when her aunt offers her an escape from Chicago to the Amish town of Sugarcreek. Struggling with being a fish out of water, Cheryl uncovers an unsettling secret that could disrupt the small town of Ohio. As Cheryl begins to solve the mystery, she finds community, belonging and the potential of new love.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Travel blogger Nicole meets Kade, a competing magazine rep while travelling abroad. When Kade's boss tasks him with buying her out, he struggles between doing his job and his growing feelings for Nicole.

programme.title: The Movie Star and the Cowboy
programme.desc: When city girl and actress, Isabella, lands a dream role as a rancher, the studio sends her to live on a ranch to learn the ropes, but she soon discovers the rancher, Hunter, is too busy trying to save his ranch from ruin.

programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: When Lindsay gets the chance to sign up to the notoriously exclusive dating service Eternity, she clashes with Will, her first date. They mutually agree that the dating service is a complete bust and make a deal to get their money back.

programme.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries: Blessings in Disguise
programme.desc: After Cheryl's three-year engagement ends in a devastating breakup, her life is turned upside down when her aunt offers her an escape from Chicago to the Amish town of Sugarcreek. Struggling with being a fish out of water, Cheryl uncovers an unsettling secret that could disrupt the small town of Ohio. As Cheryl begins to solve the mystery, she finds community, belonging and the potential of new love.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim steps up Jade's training regimen when a new competitor shows up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty prepare an unruly wild horse for international transport.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Upon her return from New York, Lou discovers that things aren't running smoothly.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy is asked to work with Lisa's racehorse, but when information is brought to light about the horse's breeding, conflict arises.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Finding Love in Sisters
programme.desc: A successful lawyer finds her dream life showing some cracks; after her mother's death, she returns to Sisters, Ore., to reunite with her sisters.

programme.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries: Blessings in Disguise
programme.desc: After Cheryl's three-year engagement ends in a devastating breakup, her life is turned upside down when her aunt offers her an escape from Chicago to the Amish town of Sugarcreek. Struggling with being a fish out of water, Cheryl uncovers an unsettling secret that could disrupt the small town of Ohio. As Cheryl begins to solve the mystery, she finds community, belonging and the potential of new love.

programme.title: When Hope Calls: Brookfield
programme.desc: Nora's relationship with Fletcher is tested; Hannah notices Wyatt and Lucie growing closer; Sam weighs his professional option.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores
programme.desc: Various issues are troubling the O'Briens; Mick is in denial about his addiction; Margaret passes the bar; Jess pursues a new idea, and Bree tries mending the rift between her and Luke.

programme.desc: Upon her return from New York, Lou discovers that things aren't running smoothly.

programme.title: Finding Love in Sisters
programme.desc: A successful lawyer finds her dream life showing some cracks; after her mother's death, she returns to Sisters, Ore., to reunite with her sisters.

programme.desc: Nora's relationship with Fletcher is tested; Hannah notices Wyatt and Lucie growing closer; Sam weighs his professional option.

programme.desc: Various issues are troubling the O'Briens; Mick is in denial about his addiction; Margaret passes the bar; Jess pursues a new idea, and Bree tries mending the rift between her and Luke.

programme.title: You Can't Teach Love
programme.desc: When publicist, Elizabeth, finds herself unexpectedly caring for her niece for a few weeks, she struggles to balance it all and finds unforeseen support from her niece's kindergarten teacher, Jamie.

programme.title: Planning for Joy
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a businesswoman and a trivia host as he helps her prepare for a television appearance.

programme.title: Hashtag Proposal
programme.desc: A fake marriage proposal goes viral, and all the attention helps two strangers with their struggling businesses. Millie and Leo play pretend while trying to ignore their growing feelings.

programme.title: With Love, Your Sweetly Salted
programme.desc: Alison remains anonymous while critiquing restaurants, but when she accidentally goes viral for trashing a new restaurant, her editor insists she make amends by going undercover as a prep cook for the chef she maligned.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: A perennially single dating coach attempts to seduce a prince as she helps him navigate the cut-throat NYC dating scene.

programme.title: Planning for Joy
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a businesswoman and a trivia host as he helps her prepare for a television appearance.

programme.title: Hashtag Proposal
programme.desc: A fake marriage proposal goes viral, and all the attention helps two strangers with their struggling businesses. Millie and Leo play pretend while trying to ignore their growing feelings.

programme.desc: Alison remains anonymous while critiquing restaurants, but when she accidentally goes viral for trashing a new restaurant, her editor insists she make amends by going undercover as a prep cook for the chef she maligned.

programme.desc: Amy tries to teach some old friends about the power of connecting to a horse.

programme.title: Luckless in Love
programme.desc: Dating blogger Winnie writes under the pen name Luckless and goes viral for a post about a bad date with a sports agent. When her boss offers Winnie her own column, she has no choice but to keep dating Holden for content.

programme.title: The Love Subscription
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a businesswoman and the founder of a gift box subscription service.

programme.title: The Confession
programme.desc: Hoping to inherit his dying wife's estate, a man hatches a plan and hires an actress to pose as her long lost daughter.

programme.title: The Shunning
programme.desc: Katie has always felt something missing in her simple Amish existence until an "Englisher" comes looking for the girl she gave up for adoption years ago.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hearts Under the Olive Tree
programme.desc: When a world-renowned author can't find inspiration for her next fantasy book, her over-bearing mother takes her to a farmland retreat to get her creative juices flowing.

programme.title: Love Unleashed
programme.desc: After her dog runs away, Sarah learns he's been adopted. As she and the new owner, Mike, battle over custody the pair fall in love. But Mike has a secret and Sarah walks away. Can true love prevail?

programme.title: Hearts Under the Olive Tree
programme.desc: When a world-renowned author can't find inspiration for her next fantasy book, her over-bearing mother takes her to a farmland retreat to get her creative juices flowing.
